heading.title: History, founder story, and the purpose behind the trust
heading.description: A minimal layout with clear information hierarchy helps the trust introduce itself with confidence and credibility.

historySection.title: Built to serve people with clarity and discipline
historySection.description: The trust began with a simple goal: make welfare support easier to access, easier to understand, and easier to trust.

founderNotes: Founded by social welfare advocates committed to practical, measurable support.
Built on a model that balances empathy, process clarity, and financial accountability.

founderSection.title: Led by social welfare advocates
founderSection.description: The founding team combined community service experience with a strong focus on process and accountability.
founderSection.statement: We wanted a welfare trust that felt transparent, calm, and dependable from the first interaction.

missionSection.title: Deliver support where it matters most
missionSection.description: We focus on education, health, and community welfare with programs that are practical and visible.

visionSection.title: A dependable, high-trust welfare organization
visionSection.description: The long-term ambition is to create a visible record of social support that donors and communities can rely on.

objectivesSection.title: The operational goals behind the trust
objectivesSection.description: Clear goals help the trust stay focused on outcomes rather than abstract messaging.

objectives: Promote education access for disadvantaged students.
Support health and nutrition interventions where they are most needed.
Develop volunteer leadership and community participation.
Maintain transparent reporting for donors and partners.

timelineSection.title: Milestones from foundation to digital transparency
timelineSection.description: The timeline creates a confident narrative that supports trust and accountability.

timeline.title: Trust founded
timeline.description: Created to provide focused welfare support with transparent local partnerships.

timeline.title: Education programs expanded
timeline.description: Scholarships and student mentoring reached multiple schools and learning centers.

timeline.title: Health outreach scaled
timeline.description: Community health camps and nutrition drives became a regular monthly initiative.

timeline.title: Digital donor reporting launched
timeline.description: A modern reporting layer now keeps supporters informed about impact and activity.
